the-hole: The user's input is concatenated into the query string, so an attacker can close the quote and inject their own SQL — the input becomes code
the-fix: Parameterize it: WHERE title LIKE ? and pass '%' + search + '%' as a bound value, so the input can never be parsed as code
least-privilege: Least privilege — if an injection or stolen credential ever hits that account, the attacker inherits only those few rights and can't read staff logins, delete orders, or drop tables

layers.Least-privilege GRANTs: Caps the blast radius if an account is compromised
layers.catalog_public view: Exposes only safe columns and hides customer/staff tables
